routing_contract.purpose: Use this compiled index to decide which repository knowledge sources should be loaded for a prompt.
routing_contract.load_when: Natural-language condition for when this node should be selected.
routing_contract.folder_default: Folder load_when values are edited only in this JSON index and default to null until configured manually.
routing_contract.selection_rule: Select the smallest set of matching documents. Use folder nodes to narrow the search space, then select specific child documents.
